Umbra Wallet — Private by Default
The most private way to use Solana. Umbra is a privacy-first crypto wallet that shields your balances, transfers, and on-chain activity from prying eyes — without sacrificing speed, simplicity, or access to DeFi.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Why Umbra?
Every transaction you make on Solana is public. Your wallet balance, your transfer history, your DeFi positions — all of it is visible to anyone who knows your address. Umbra changes that.
Built from the ground up for privacy, Umbra uses zero-knowledge cryptography to give you control over what you share and what stays hidden. No compromises on performance. No clunky workarounds. Just a clean, modern wallet that treats your financial privacy as a right, not a feature request.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Core Features
𝗦𝗵𝗶𝗲𝗹𝗱𝗲𝗱 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗳𝗲𝗿𝘀
Send and receive SOL and SPL tokens without exposing the transaction to the public ledger. Umbra's shielded transfers use zero-knowledge proofs to keep your sender address, recipient address, and transfer amount confidential. You get the finality and speed of Solana with the privacy of cash.
𝗣𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲
Toggle Private Mode to shield your entire wallet from on-chain observers. When activated, your balances and activity are routed through Umbra's privacy layer, making it significantly harder for third parties to track your holdings or build a profile of your financial behavior. Turn it on when you need discretion. Turn it off when you don't. It's your call.
𝗗𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲
A first-of-its-kind safety feature for crypto. Distress Mode lets you set up a secondary wallet view that displays a limited, decoy balance. If you're ever coerced into revealing your wallet — whether through a physical threat, a social engineering attack, or any situation where you feel unsafe — Distress Mode gives you a believable exit without exposing your real funds. Because personal safety should never be an afterthought.
𝗚𝗮𝘀𝗹𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗳𝗲𝗿𝘀
Send tokens without needing SOL in your wallet to cover transaction fees. Umbra abstracts gas away so you can transfer USDC, USDT, and other SPL tokens the moment you receive them — no friction, no fumbling with fee tokens. Onboarding into crypto has never been this smooth.
𝗗𝗲𝗙𝗶 𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀
Access swaps, liquidity, and yield — all from within the wallet. Umbra connects to leading Solana DeFi protocols so you can trade, earn, and manage your portfolio without hopping between apps or exposing your activity across multiple frontends.
𝗖𝗹𝗲𝗮𝗻, 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻 𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗳𝗮𝗰𝗲
No clutter. No learning curve. Umbra's interface is designed for clarity — whether you're checking a balance, approving a transaction, or toggling privacy settings. Everything is where you'd expect it to be, and nothing is buried behind confusing menus.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
How It Works

Install the Umbra Wallet extension from the Chrome Web Store.
Create a new wallet or import an existing one.
Start sending, receiving, and managing your Solana assets with privacy enabled by default.

Umbra integrates directly into your browser. When you visit a Solana dApp, Umbra acts as your wallet provider — just like any other extension wallet — but with a privacy layer running underneath. Connect to your favorite protocols, approve transactions, and interact with the Solana ecosystem knowing that your activity isn't being broadcast to the world.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Who Is Umbra For?
→ Individuals who value financial privacy and don't want their on-chain activity surveilled, profiled, or exploited.
→ Traders and investors who want to move funds without signaling their positions to the market.
→ Freelancers, contractors, and anyone receiving crypto payments who'd rather not have their income visible on a public ledger.
→ People in regions where financial privacy is a matter of personal safety, not just preference.
→ Anyone who's ever looked at a block explorer, seen their entire transaction history laid out in the open, and thought: this shouldn't be the default.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Privacy Without the Trade-offs
Most privacy tools in crypto ask you to give something up — speed, usability, access to DeFi, compatibility with mainstream protocols. Umbra doesn't.
Umbra runs on Solana, which means sub-second finality and negligible fees. The privacy layer is built on zero-knowledge proofs, which means cryptographic guarantees rather than trust assumptions. And the wallet itself is designed to feel as intuitive as the best fintech apps, which means you don't need to be a cryptography expert to protect your financial life.
Privacy should be the starting point, not the thing you bolt on after the fact. Umbra is built on that principle.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Security
Your keys never leave your device. Umbra does not store, transmit, or have access to your private keys or seed phrase at any point. All sensitive cryptographic operations happen locally in the extension. Your wallet, your keys, your funds — fully self-custodial.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Open Development
Umbra is built in the open. We believe privacy tools should be transparent by nature — you shouldn't have to trust us, you should be able to verify. Our approach to privacy is grounded in well-established cryptographic primitives, and we're committed to making the system auditable and verifiable as we grow.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Get Started
Install Umbra Wallet and take back control of your financial privacy on Solana. It takes less than a minute to set up, and once you do, you'll wonder why every wallet doesn't work this way.
Questions, feedback, or feature requests? Reach out to us at dev@umbraprivacy.com or find us on X @UmbraPrivacy.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Umbra Wallet is developed by Phoenix DAO LLC.

Over.fig – Compare design to website in real time
Bridge the gap between design and code. Convert your Figma into a pixel-perfect semi-transparent overlay directly on your web page.

🚀 All features are 100% free
Achieve pixel-perfect accuracy between your Figma designs and live websites.

No more switching tabs. No more guessing margins, fonts, or colors. And no more static image overlays that limit interaction.

With Over.fig, you can overlay any Figma frame as a semi-transparent layer directly on your web page — preserving structure, spacing, and styles. Compare, inspect, and develop in real time, all within your browser.

Bring the design into your workflow. Build faster. Ship with confidence.

🛠️ How It Works
- Paste any Figma design link
- Select a frame for overlay
- Compare HTML overlay to website

✅ Key Features
- Сompare the design with the live web page in one click
- Pixel-Perfect Accuracy
- Effortless Figma CSS inspection and transform into Tailwind utility classes
- Precise measurement tools
- Custom font support
- Download pre-optimized Figma project media straight from the extension
- Time-saving workflow
- Media queries & device verification

🎯 Who Is Over.fig For?
- Frontend Developers – Build with confidence, match designs exactly.
- QA & UI/UX Engineers – Validate implementation against design specs.
- Design-to-Code Teams – Reduce feedback loops and misalignment.
- Freelancers & Agencies – Deliver pixel-perfect results, faster.

🔒 Privacy & Security
Over.fig does not collect any personal data or website information. All comparison processing happens locally in your browser — nothing is sent to external servers. 
The browser extension requires access to Figma only to read design files — no editing, copying, or sharing of your content is performed. Your Figma files remain secure and private.

Improve Your Workflow. Ship Pixel-Perfect Sites.

Highlight selected text in webpages, add notes and visit the webpage again to see highlighted text and saved notes.

🖍️ Online Highlighter Extension for Chrome™ – Save & Organize Your Research Effortlessly

Looking for a reliable web 𝗛𝗶𝗴𝗵𝗹𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝗲𝗿 Chrome™ extension to keep track of important information? This text highlighter Chrome™ extension makes it simple to highlight, save, and revisit key content on any webpage.

💡 𝗛𝗼𝘄 𝗜𝘁 𝗪𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀:

Highlight selected text on a webpage using the highlighter for Chrome™ and save it to view later.

Add personal notes to highlighted sections and access them whenever you revisit the page.

All your saved highlights and notes stay linked to the same webpage for quick reference.

⚡ 𝗤𝘂𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗦𝗵𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗰𝘂𝘁𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻𝘁 𝗛𝗶𝗴𝗵𝗹𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴

Windows: Press Ctrl + Shift + 2 to highlight instantly.

Mac: Press Cmd + Shift + 2 for fast highlighting.

📝 𝗔𝗱𝗱 𝗡𝗼𝘁𝗲𝘀 𝗘𝗳𝗳𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗹𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗹𝘆

Windows: Press Ctrl + Shift + 4 to add a note instantly.

Mac: Press Cmd + Shift + 4 for quick note-taking.

With this highlighter for web pages, you’ll never lose track of critical insights, research notes, or references again. 🚀 Perfect for students, professionals, and researchers who need an efficient highlighter Chrome™ extension to stay organized.
A Google Meet supported Chrome Extension that make transcriptions using Captions

Allows real-time transcription in languages such as Portuguese, Spanish and others that are not yet supported by Google Meet's native transcription. The captions are then instantly sent to a Google Docs document, where a human agent can track and make corrections to the transcript in real time.

Click the “cc” button in Meet to turn on captions and your transcription will begin. You can set subtitles for the language spoken by the audience.
Screen Translator - Translate PDF, Docs, Word, PowerPoint, Images, Comic...
Drag to select any area on a webpage and translate text from GG Drive, PDFs, Docs, Word, PowerPoint, images, comics—right on screen.

🚀 Getting Started

● After installing the extension, reload the page you want to translate
● Click the extension icon, or Ctrl+Shift+X in Windows, or Command+Shift+X in Mac
● Drag to select an area on the page
● Wait for the translation overlay
● Read, copy, or hide the translated text
● (Optional) Pin extension to toolbar to start action quickly

✨ Key Features

● Drag & select any area on a webpage
● Overlay translated text at the original position
● Show / hide translation layer anytime
● Double click the text to copy
● Customizable translate language in Options
● Customizable auto translate with the last area coordinates in Options
● Supports translation in up to 50 languages worldwide

🔐 Privacy & Data Usage

● Text and images are processed only for translation purposes
● No personal data is sold or shared with third parties
● Data handling is clearly described in our Privacy Policy

👉 Learn more: https://screentranslator.thegioigiandon.com/about-us
👉 Feedback: https://screentranslator.thegioigiandon.com/feedback

Bookmark Save: Export Twitter & X Bookmarks (PDF, CSV, MD)
The fastest way to export and backup your X (Twitter) bookmarks. Save tweets to PDF, CSV, or Markdown. Secure, Private & 100% Free.

Don't let your valuable X (Twitter) bookmarks disappear.

Bookmark Save is the premium tool for professionals, researchers, and creators who need to preserve their digital knowledge base. Export, organize, and back up your X bookmarks in seconds—completely for free.

🚀 WHY BOOKMARK SAVE?
Unlike clunky alternatives, Bookmark Save offers a beautiful, dark-mode first experience that feels just like a native app. We prioritize your privacy and data ownership.

✨ KEY FEATURES

📄 Instant Export Formats
Download your data in the format that works for you:
*   PDF: Perfect for reading and archiving visual content.
*   CSV: Ideal for spreadsheets and data analysis.
*   Markdown: Great for Notion, Obsidian, and personal wikis.
*   TXT: Simple plain text backups.

🧹 Smart Cleanup
*   Auto-Remove Feature: specificy to automatically un-bookmark tweets on X after they are successfully exported. Keep your feed clean and organized.

🔒 Privacy First
*   No Data Storage: Your bookmarks are processed locally. We do not store, sell, or analyze your data.
*   Secure Sign-In: Powered securely by Google authentication.

🎨 Premium Experience
*   Modern Dark Mode: A sleek interface designed for night-mode lovers.
*   Export History: Easily re-download previous exports without re-scraping.

🏆 PERFECT FOR:
*   Researchers building archives of industry insights.
*   Content Creators saving inspiration for future posts.
*   Developers keeping track of code snippets and tech threads.
*   You, so you never lose that funny tweet again.

---
Note: Bookmark Save is currently free to use. Enjoy the premium experience without the premium price tag.
AllAi, boosting productivity at OSF for Multicloud projects.

AllAi Chrome is a powerful browser extension designed to enhance your Salesforce experience by providing quick and personalized access to AI assistance. Tailored for all roles across all Salesforce clouds, AllAi Chrome is the ultimate companion for individuals seeking expert support and improved productivity. 

 

What is AllAi Chrome? 

AllAi Chrome is an innovative extension that brings the power of AllAi directly to your browser. It seamlessly integrates with Salesforce, providing specialized help cloud by cloud. With AllAi Chrome, you can access AI tools and support right within the pages you're browsing, making it easier than ever to get the assistance you need. 

Who is it for? 

AllAi Chrome is designed for Salesforce users of all roles and across all clouds. Whether you're a developer, marketer, administrator, or any other Salesforce professional, AllAi Chrome is tailored to meet your specific needs. It provides specialized support for Salesforce Marketing Cloud, offering tailored prompts and assistance for each specific language on SFMC. 

 

Benefits of AllAi Chrome: 

1. Save Time: AllAi Chrome streamlines your daily efficiency by providing quick access to an AI assistant. Instead of switching between tabs and applications, you can get instant support and answers to your tasks and questions, saving you valuable time. 

2. Perform at Your Best: AllAi Chrome improves your work quality by giving you expert assistance. With personalized prompts and tailored support, you can perform at your best and achieve optimal results in your Salesforce tasks. 

3. AllAi Chrome Side Panel: With the extension, you get access to AllAi Chrome in a convenient Google Chrome side panel. This allows you to seamlessly interact with the AI assistant while browsing, without interrupting your workflow. 

4. Context Bubble: AllAi Chrome instantly captures selected text from any webpage, making it available for AI assistance. You can ask questions and utilize one-click prompts that are context-aware and can change based on your selection or the page you're on. 

Features of AllAi Chrome: 

1. SFMC Specialization: AllAi Chrome is specially designed to cater to Salesforce Marketing Cloud users. It provides specialized prompts and assistance on SFMC pages, ensuring personalized and tuned help for your current tasks. 

2. One-Click Prompts: Whenever you select text on any webpage, AllAi Chrome offers context help with one-click prompts. These prompts are tailored to the selected text and can change based on the page you're on, providing instant assistance and guidance. 

3. SFMC Role Specialization: AllAi Chrome allows you to choose your role and customize your experience. By selecting your specific role within Salesforce Marketing Cloud, you can further personalize the AI assistance and prompts to align with your unique needs. 

 

AllAi Chrome is the ultimate AI assistant extension for Salesforce users. It provides quick and personalized access to AI assistance, saving you time, improving your work quality, and enhancing your overall productivity. With specialized support for Salesforce Marketing Cloud and customizable features, AllAi Chrome empowers you to perform at your best in your Salesforce tasks. Try AllAi Chrome today and unlock the full potential of your Salesforce experience.

Text Shortcuts: canned messages and replies
Use customizable text shortcuts for frequently used text responses like canned replies. Save time and type smarter!

Simplify typing with Text Shortcuts.

Text Shortcuts is your go-to tool for creating and managing personalized keyboard shortcuts for frequently used text phrases. Whether it's responding to emails, engaging with customers, or just speeding up repetitive typing, this extension has you covered. Use Text Shortcuts to craft canned replies, auto-response messages, or even canned email templates for Gmail.

➤ Available features:

Expand your productivity toolbox with canned responses for Gmail or other platforms. This extension allows users to pre-define and manage frequently used phrases, turning repetitive typing into a single keystroke. Text Shortcuts saves time and reduces effort, whether you're composing auto-responses in Gmail or crafting canned email messages.

•  Customizable shortcuts. Create shortcuts for any text phrase, and assign them a unique trigger (such as /welcome or /thanks).
•  Organized folders. Group shortcuts into folders like "Work emails" or "Support responses" for easy management.
•  Quick access. Configure a browser hotkey to instantly open and close the extension.
•  Edit and delete with ease. Modify or remove shortcuts as your needs change with a clean, user-friendly interface.
•  Error validation. Avoid duplicate or invalid shortcuts with built-in guidance.

➤ How it works:

1. Open the extension by clicking on the icon next to the address bar or using the configured browser hotkey.
2. Add a new shortcut by specifying a name, folder, and trigger.
3. Access your saved shortcuts directly from the menu when you right-click.
4. Type your trigger in any input field, and watch your saved text auto-complete instantly!
5. Organize shortcuts into folders for better workflow efficiency.

➤ Use cases:

•  Customer support. Respond to FAQs like "shipping updates" or "refunds" faster than ever with canned responses or pre-written replies.
•  Sales professionals. Quickly send templated responses like price negotiations or product inquiries using canned messages in Gmail.
•  Personal productivity. Automate typing of addresses, email signatures, or frequent reminders. Ideal for setting up canned messages Gmail users can utilize repeatedly.
•  Gmail users. Take advantage of auto-response capabilities and create canned response examples that boost efficiency.

Stop wasting time on repetitive typing. Download Text Shortcuts today and type smarter, not harder!

Productivity improvement toolkit for Ewoq raters. Toolkit includes the following features:

1. Url Autolauncher: Automatically launch urls on a new task load and close urls from the previous task
* On each task load, the extension will launch the url in a new tab automatically and close the tab from the previous task. As part of task load, the extension closes the previously opened Snipit tabs.

2. Snipit Autopaste: Automatically paste snipit links to the rating task whenever a snipit is captured. 
* For each new Snipit page load, automatically copies the snipit url link on the task where the field is marked with "snipit_autopaste"

3. Capture live task reviewed Url and autopaste: On a new task load, capture the url of the reviewed entity. This could be the same url as the request or it could be a redirect. Automatically pastes the url in the task for post processing. The field marked with "review_url_autopaste" is used to paste the live reviewed url. Captures the first page complete or loading event only to restrict overriding by future url loads

4. Handle Chrome pre-rendering for review urls and mark them for closure. Also paste them in the task if the final review url is requested.

Get instant notifications when your favorite twitch streamers come online!
Twitch Notification is a Chrome extension that will greatly improve the way to manage your favorite now streamers. In addition to having all live streamers in one place, you will enter your favorite Twitch streams with one click!

Features:
  - Get notification whenever a streamer you follow starts live
  - access to your favorite streamers quickly
  - Enable or disable notifications

How to use: 
1. Click “Add to Chrome” and install Twitch Notification
2.log in with your account（extension has access only "your follow"）
3. Click the extension icon, you can watch the live streamers that you follow
4. In addition, you can get instant notifications when your favorite streamers come online
5. Have fun!

Q&A
Why do I need Twitch account authorization?
We need to capture the information of the streamers you follow at all times, so we need your account authorization. Please rest assured that we will not obtain any other information from the account.
Where do I get the streamer's go-live notification?
You can receive his online notification in your chrome browser, just click the notification window, and you can jump directly to the live page

Stay Ahead of the Market with InvestFellow: Real-Time 📈 Stock Tracking + Price Alerts + AI-Powered Market Intelligence at Your Fingertips

Track real-time prices for Stocks, Crypto, Indices, Futures, and ETFs from a stock ticker toolbar that stays visible while you browse. Set price alerts and get notified the moment a stock hits your target. No extra tabs, no app switching.

InvestFellow integrates into your browsing experience with a customizable toolbar that shows live stock data from exchanges in the USA and worldwide 🌍, with optional AI insights to help you think through your trades.

Key Features:

Free vs Premium:

The core experience (live prices, watchlist, market movers, and search) is completely free. Premium unlocks unlimited price alerts, faster refresh rates, and AI-powered analysis for each stock with detailed insights on sentiment, momentum, liquidity, and technical signals.

Who it's for:
